name: Dynamo Dreesen (Acido Records) / Krüger
description:
Dynamo Dreesen

Dj and creative music director behind acido records since 2004.

One half of the techno duo Dreesvn and Dynatron.

Heavily inspired by all sublime electronic productions from the 70’s to mid
90’s.

Drifting from movie sound tracks to raw groove excursions to atmospheric
chilled electronics.

—

Krüger varmer opp gølvet!

ID: 20
CC: 150,-
